title: iberis bernardiana var. bubanii
intro: Iberis bernardiana var. bubanii, also known as the Iberian candytuft, is a perennial plant species in the Brassicaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Iberis bernardiana var. bubanii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or decoction that can be consumed for medicinal purposes.
